text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I invite Trainer Kiryuin out to the park for a day
of rest and relaxation...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
It's been a while since I've come to the park for
reasons outside of work!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...I played at the park by myself a lot when I was
young.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
D-don't get me wrong, I had friends! But I also
liked to play alone.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: For instance, I used to gaze up at the sky while I was on top of the jungle gym and read Twinkle Monthly...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Or I would sit on the swing and read the Trainer's
Handbook...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: You know, fun stuff like that!
choice_data_list: That sounds more like studying to me...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's not all I did! Since you're so curious, I
also enjoyed the rest of the playground too!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: The seesaw, the horizontal bar, and so on...
choice_data_list: Did you play alone on the seesaw?
Are you pretty good on the horizontal bar?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. As an adult, I couldn't recommend this to
children, but...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I would stand on one the end of the seesaw and
then walk over to the other end. That really
helped me with my balance!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The trick is to start lowering your stance once you
cross to the opposite side.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
If you want to improve your sense of balance,
doing that over and over with the right posture is
the way to go.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! I'll just show you. Watch!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
So, you avoid the seat, then extend your spine
nice and straight...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
See? This is the point where it's easy to lose your
balance, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kiryuin extends both of her hands out to keep her
balance. She looks quite proud as she crosses the
seesaw.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Not bad, right? My friends always tell me that I've
got good balance. I'm very confident in it...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Ah, s-sorry. I'm rambling now, aren't I?
choice_data_list: I'm gonna give it a shot too!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, go for it! I'll be right beside you, so don't
worry!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making sure there are no children around to
see, I play on the seesaw with Trainer Kiryuin.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Yeah, especially pull-ups!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
The trick is to use your strength to gradually get
used to doing it, rather than trying to do it all at
once.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: For starters, just do ten... or even just five.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Results may be the most important thing at the
end of the day, but that doesn't mean you should
ignore the process.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
You'll only find your way to good results if you
have a solid base of hard work!
choice_data_list:
This sounds less like playing and more like
training, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I-if that's the case, then maybe I actually haven't
played at the park before...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A look of shock comes over Trainer Kiryuin's face
as she realizes this, so I invite her to play on the
swings with me.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't really do anything at first, but I got
more and more used to it until I could do a
hundred!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
...Come to think of it, I haven't done any pull-ups
at all lately. Do you mind if I try now?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I cheer Trainer Kiryuin on as she does pull-ups
with a fiercely determined expression.
